name: node-negotiator
title: node-negotiator
description:
HTTP content negotiator for Node.js
node-negotiator parses HTTP Accept headers to return preferred
media types, languages, charsets, encodings from lists of
available choices.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-negotiator because HTTP content negotiator for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-negotiator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-negotiator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-negotiator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
